title: Sterling KM1 Key Storage Box, Black, KeyMinder 1
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Storage for door and padlock keys
description: From the manufacturer Avoid Being Locked Out Controlled access without duplicate keys 10,000 resettable combinations Strong zinc die-cast body resists attack Weather resistant "0-0-0-0" Auto stop aids opening in poor light Access to combination holders only Shared access for occupants Large dials for easy entering of combination KeyMinder Key Safes Secure storage for keys For home and office KeyMinders for secure storage for keys and are ideal for school children, wardens community care and They come in a new compact design with large easy to use dials and a heavier body for maximum protection against attack. They come in a new compact design with large easy to use dials and a heavier body for maximum protection against attack. Available in four different sizes KeyMinder 1 Discreet compact design for storage of door and padlock keys. Maximum key length 7cm. KeyMinder 2 Large dials for easy entering of combination to store door and padlock keys on a key hook for enhanced security. Maximum key length 7cm. KeyMinder 3 Can be used indoors as a small safe for valuables and credit cars or just to store door, padlock and car keys. Maximum key length 11cm. KeyMinder 4 New large ergonomic design with big easy to use dials and a heavier body for maximum protection against attack. With a magnetic key holder and offering enhanced security. Maximum key length 12cm.
